model_specification_line: results = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ daca_eligible * post_daca + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex) + C(educ) + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + JAIL287G", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
